suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'onSessionComplete' and 'text'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'onSessionComplete' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [isListening, finalTranscript, text, onSessionComplete]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'onSessionComplete', 'status', and 'text'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'onSessionComplete' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [endedAt, onSessionComplete, startedAt, status, text]
